evidence_slot_audit.systematic_failure: claim_gamma omitted ev-11 in all four runs
evidence_slot_audit.additional_failure: claim_delta used the exact ev-09 array in only one of four runs

gate_audit.fairness_issue: The evaluator expected run_targeted_state_transition_smoke, but the model-visible required_postconditions did not declare an exact next_action value.

classification.model_failure: The model did not preserve the explicitly declared per-slot evidence arrays.
classification.protocol_defect: The strict gate metric included an exact next_action obligation that was not fully exposed in the model-visible postconditions.
classification.successful_components: All four runs produced valid schema, exact residual unknown-state vocabulary, the correct event-backed unknown-to-approved transition, and the exact retention attestation.

retry_decision: No retry. All four outputs were complete parseable semantic attempts.
next_repair: Expose the complete expected transition_gate object, including next_action.
Freeze grounded claim objects or move immutable slot-to-reference bindings into a separate exact payload so editable prose cannot trigger semantic remapping.
Add a wrong-next-action known-bad and claim-to-evidence remapping known-bads.
Pass a new local gate before requesting any repair smoke.
